---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user-visible problem does this solve? Include a concrete
scenario you ran into ("I tried to do X and Y happened").

## Proposed solution

What you'd like MeManga to do. UI sketch or rough code shape welcome,
not required.

## Alternatives considered

Anything else you tried or considered, and why it wasn't enough.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to similar features in other apps, related issues.
